content: The Secret Armory of General Knoxx
name: Rose
description: An Anshin pearlescent heal shield from the General Knoxx DLC. When broken after a full recharge, it instantly restores around 333 health—a lifesaver in tight spots.

special.description: On shield break after full recharge, restores approximately 333 health. Triggers once per full recharge cycle.
special.title: Beauty and Life
